coreCompetencies: LLM data infrastructure: pgvector / RAG · Text-to-SQL
Direct collaboration with non-developer / analyst stakeholders

summary.headline: Communicative Engineer Focused on Data Consumers
summary.body: I believe the true value of a Data Engineer lies in delivering 'consumer-friendly data' that teammates can leverage immediately. Beyond mechanical ingestion, I take ownership of the data environment by actively communicating with the analysts and developers who consume it.

summary.headline: Tenacious Pursuit of Root Causes Over Surface Symptoms
summary.body: I am not satisfied with pipelines that merely run. When incidents occur, instead of applying quick workarounds, I dig into the architecture and logs to find the real cause. I enjoy structurally resolving the underlying problems beneath the symptoms and optimizing the system in the process.

summary.headline: Proactive Curiosity for Absorbing Unfamiliar Technology
summary.body: Rather than settling for familiar tools, I personally engage with the latest data ecosystem trends — LLMs, Vector DBs — through hands-on side projects. I aim to be an engineer who absorbs needed technologies fearlessly, like a sponge, growing without limits.

responsibilities.title: Design and Operation of End-to-End Data Pipelines
details: Operated **15+ Airflow DAGs**, ensuring unattended-operation stability through retry, dependency, and alerting design

responsibilities.title: Domain-Driven Data Modeling & Automated Validation
details: Decided normalization vs. denormalization based on user access patterns, and introduced proactive detection of unmapped records and outliers

responsibilities.title: Collaboration with Non-Developer & Analyst Stakeholders
details: Liaised directly with public-sector clients, financial-sector clients, and in-house analysts, translating requirements into pipeline design

projects.title: Livestock Disease Prediction Data Pipeline — Animal & Plant Quarantine Agency (2025.06 ~ 2025.12)
details: Built and operated ETL for ASF / HPAI / FMD prediction models in a closed-network environment (**9 DAGs**)
Improved legacy computation throughput by **12x (1 day → 2 hours)**
Achieved unattended-remote-operation stability via per-table task isolation + structured incident logging

projects.title: Real Estate Price Data Pipeline (2025.04 ~ 2026.02)
details: Operated monthly price generation/validation/delivery pipelines for financial-sector clients (**6 DAGs**, ~**13M records** on a 100m grid)
Refactored legacy logic, improving monthly price computation by **3x (6 hours → 2 hours)**
Introduced automated validation to pre-detect and correct grid-price / PNU mapping defects

projects.title: Auction Data Collection Pipeline (2025.04 ~ 2026.02)
details: Built an automated auction collection/processing pipeline for external sale (3 servers, **~2,000–3,000 records/day**)
Mitigated IP blocking and optimized targeted collection, achieving **2x collection speed-up** (12,000 → 4,000 records/day)
Designed denormalized tables with analyst usage in mind (composite PK: case_no + court + auction_date)

projects.title: Road Intersection Network Construction (2025.03 ~ 2025.04)
details: Extended nationwide road-intersection spatial data and designed analytical attributes for the in-house analytics team
Expanded spatial data **4.6x (18K → 84K nodes)** using QGIS + Python post-processing

projects.name: Game MumulBot — Game-Specialized LLM Chatbot Data Pipeline
projects.team: 2-person team / Sole owner of DE·AI data architecture (100%)
projects.techStack: Python, Airflow, PostgreSQL, pgvector, FastAPI, RAG, OpenAI, Next.js

highlights.title: Optimized Airflow-Based ETL Collection
details: Separated static vs. dynamic collection cycles for Lost Ark / TFT APIs, **reducing per-character payload by 79% (82KB → 17KB)**
Built scalability headroom against API rate limits via this payload reduction

highlights.title: Unified RDBMS + Vector DB and Optimized RAG Performance
details: Adopted pgvector to consolidate storage and optimized retrieval logic, **cutting token usage by 84%**

highlights.title: Normalized Semi-Structured (JSONB) Data and Built Self-Monitoring
details: Flattened heavy semi-structured game data into numeric form, **boosting query performance by 5.3x (0.644ms → 0.121ms)**, and built a dashboard tracking LLM cost & token usage

projects.name: TFT Challenger Weekly Match Data Pipeline
projects.techStack: Python, Airflow, AWS Lambda, S3, PostgreSQL, SparkSQL, Tableau, Docker
highlights: Resolved local Airflow heartbeat errors via a Lambda-decoupled architecture (Airflow as trigger only; invocation & processing on Lambda)
Triggered Lambdas in batches of 3 to handle API rate limits and minimize record loss
Operated 2 DAGs (user ingestion / game collection); modeled user-match-unit-trait relations across 6 normalized tables

education.school: The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)

languages.level: Business level (5+ years in Hong Kong; CUHK, English-medium instruction)
